productName: Good Tide Kiwi Strawberry Gummies - Hybrid Rosin + CBD + CBG - 100mg THC : 100mg CBD : 100mg CBG
description: These sweet, juicy strawberry gummies taste like they came from a secret candy kitchen: slow-set, fruit-forward, and infused evenly for a smooth edible experience. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, and CBG to support daytime focus and clarity. Enjoy slowly and let the infused finish settle in at its own pace.
